reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención,  los baños impecables limpios , perfumados . Da gusto visitar esa estación.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the restrooms were spotless, clean, and smelled nice. It's a pleasure to visit this station.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en playa y en la cafetería,  los baños bastante limpios ( podían estar un poco mejor) . Un lugar para recomendar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service on the beach and in the cafeteria, the restrooms were quite clean (though they could be a little better). A place I would recommend.

reviews.comment:
Baños muy limpios pero las medialunas eran espantosas, no las pudimos comer, las tuvimos que tirar, nada recomendables !!

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean, but the croissants were awful; we couldn't eat them and had to throw them away. Not recommended at all!
